---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a problem with PortPane
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: Computer-Tsu
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear description of what went wrong.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Connect [describe your USB device]
2. Open PortPane
3. ...

## Expected Behavior
What should have happened.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, attach a screenshot.

## Environment
- **PortPane version:** (see window title bar)
- **Windows version:** (Settings > System > About)
- **USB device(s) connected:** (brand/model if known)
- **Digital mode software in use:** (FT8 / Winlink / Fldigi / etc.)

## Log File
Please attach the log file from:
`%LOCALAPPDATA%\ShackDesk\PortPane\Logs\`

Attach the most recent `portpane-*.log` file.
